programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Doctor Love
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo unravels the twisted tale of what happened to a woman who thought she found the perfect man while online dating, until the promising love story went horribly wrong and somebody ended up dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Killzone
programme.desc: Marty helps homesteaders in Oregon build a barn; Misty creates a subterranean garden; Matt finds a human approach to a mysterious predator threat.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, unaware of the others' existence, are dropped miles apart in the Panamanian rainforest to survive for 21 days under the harshest of conditions; each couple battles the elements, each other, and their own inner weaknesses.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: Dredgers and divers search for gold deep at the bottom of the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Conquering Alaska
programme.desc: John, our extreme survival instructor, is put to the test as he's taken down in broad daylight and dropped on an Alaskan glacier with little more than a pool cue to defend himself.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Army Veteran Tom is captured, hooded, handcuffed and dropped on a volcano in the wilderness of Chile. He'll need all his bushcraft skills to scale glaciers, conquer an impenetrable jungle and brave the desolation as he races to find civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Extreme Survival Instructor John is gassed by the guys at his dentist appointment, extracted to the Canyon lands of Utah and dropped into a 200 ft. crevasse. Forced to confront a devilish maze of claustrophobic dead end passages, can he make it out?

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Green Hell
programme.desc: Matt, our primitive skills expert, is snatched from his surfboard and dumped into the Costa Rican jungle in his flip-flops. Treacherous waterfalls, poisonous snakes and blood-sucking ticks abound.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Epic Fail
programme.desc: Jake's game takes a deadly turn in the Namib Desert.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Get Rich or Die Flyin'
programme.desc: With three assets and three million bucks on the table, Kevin is looking at one of the most complex missions of his career. To pull it off, Kevin calls in Mike Kennedy. Meanwhile, Ken and Danny hunt down a one million dollar race boat.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Rat Race
programme.desc: Ken and Danny must race to beat out rival repo men on the biggest yacht heist of their careers. Mike finds himself in a high stakes game of 'chicken' between a six million dollar Lear jet and a Lamborghini.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Heat is Off
programme.desc: As summer's end approaches, Shawn claws his way closer to the top of the gold count. Emily leaves her unpredictable father to tend on the Eroica. Kris works his new partnership in pursuit of a brighter future. Ken pushes the repaired Myrtle Irene.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Record Breaking Lump!
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90% of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Where Are They Now: Jose
programme.desc: See how Jose's life has changed after Dr. Lee removed his 'ball.'

programme.desc: The ER becomes a crime scene when a woman is brought in with intense belly pain; a doctor is mystified by heart attacks occurring the same day in the same family; strange markings on the body of a car crash victim lead to the cause of the accident.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Fireworks

programme.title: Storage Wars: Live and Let Bid

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pay the Lady

programme.title: Storage Wars: San Burrito

programme.title: Storage Wars: Enemy of the Enemy

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tanks for the Memories

programme.title: House: Whac-a-Mole
programme.desc: House's newest patient is 18-year-old Jack, brought to the hospital after experiencing a heart attack and massive vomiting. Barely an adult himself, Jack has been the parent to his younger brother and sister since their parents died.

programme.title: House: Finding Judas
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of Alice, a young girl with pancreatitis. Since her divorced parents can't agree on how to proceed with her treatment and won't let House bully them into making a decision, House's only option is to take them to court.

programme.title: House: Merry Little Christmas
programme.desc: Detective Tritter's pursuit of House leads Cuddy and Wilson to force House into detox. House and the team try to diagnose one of Cuddy's patients, a 15-year-old dwarf suffering from a collapsed lung.

programme.title: House: Words and Deeds
programme.desc: House is forced to respond in court to the criminal charges against him regarding illegal possession of narcotics, and the judge sets a date for a preliminary hearing. Enough is enough for Cuddy, who insists that House apologize to Detective Tritter.

programme.title: House: One Day, One Room
programme.desc: After beating the drug charges, House is back at the hospital after a short stint in rehab. Cuddy collects on House's debt for perjuring herself on the stand by making him to carry out a series of less-than-desirable patient exams in clinic hours.

programme.title: House: Insensitive
programme.desc: House takes special interest in a patient, Hannah, who has sustained injuries from a car accident but is completely insensitive to pain. Cuddy and Wilson accuse House of pushing Hannah's tests to get information that may benefit his own pain management.

programme.title: House: Half-Wit

programme.title: House: Top Secret

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'

programme.desc: Rising sea temperatures test the fleet. Toxic smoke engulfs the Saga. Sean struggles to save the family business on the Brenna A. Wild Bill fears he could lose Nick to a terminal illness.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Crushing Blows
programme.desc: Wild Bill uncovers the truth about Nick McGlashan's terminal illness. A damaging mechanical issue threatens to crush Jake's future. Warming seas force Keith into the unknown.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bad Moon
programme.desc: Johnathan and Andy Hillstrand fish together for the last time. A fistfight tests Jake's resolve while heavy winds and a snapped anchor threaten to wreck his boat.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hail Mary, Full of Crab
programme.desc: A massive leak fills the Time Bandit. A fistfight tests Jake's resolve while heavy winds, and a snapped anchor threaten to wreck his boat. Sig's greenhorn has an awkward question.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Poisoned at Sea
programme.desc: A big decision weighs on Sig Hansen. Rookie captain Sean Dwyer gambles on a new venture with a new crew. Jake Anderson struggles to replace a lost anchor before his quota is taken away.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Phantom of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote races to Australia in search of the Perentie monitor. After a grueling week, the team makes one final attempt to capture the lizard and builds a makeshift birds nest filled with fresh eggs, in hopes of capturing the Phantom of the Outback.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Sharks in the Shadows
programme.desc: Coyote and his team travel to Australia to find the wobbegong shark. As night falls, they search the treacherous tidepools for this sly nocturnal predator and ponder whether these fearsome fish are a threat to humans.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Dinner With a Devil
programme.desc: Coyote heads to Australia's Devil Ark conservatory and reveals the history behind the critically endangered Tasmanian devil. As he is exposed to their habitat and routine, he discovers the manpower needed to conserve this species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Deadly Tide Pools
programme.desc: Coyote explores the coastline of Australia in hopes of discovering the most toxic aquatic creatures. As he battles the jagged rocks and crashing waves, he encounters a stonefish lurking beneath the mysterious tide pool water.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species. As he swims through the watery oasis, he strategically stalks the Marten’s water monitor in hopes of having a face-to-face encounter.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: An extreme angler is on the trail of a monster that leads him to the site of the worst nuclear accident in history, Chernobyl.

programme.title: River Monsters: Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade pushes himself and his gear past breaking point to discover what killed a bride in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates his most disturbing case yet when he is faced with the story of a man who had his face ripped off in a remote Bolivian river. The journey through dangerous jungle ends with a confrontation with one of his oldest adversaries.

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: New Zealand's freshwaters have been a safe place for swimmers, yet as Jeremy finds out, its remote rivers and deep lakes provide refuge for an ancient and slippery predator that has stayed hidden for more than a century.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: A coming-of-age film about Tre, a bright teenager who is sent to live with his father when his mother feels he needs a male role model. Tre's father guides him to choose the smartest path when he becomes torn between gang life and attending college.

programme.title: Movie: The Players Club
programme.desc: A story about the ruthless characters who hang out at a local gentlemen's only club.

programme.title: Movie: Men in Black

programme.desc: Will and Carleton almost ruin everything for Hilary's show; Ashley wants to move to NY.

programme.desc: Determined to make their marriage work, Kim and Jerel make plans to move to Paris.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infested Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina land on a small three-bedroom, two-bathroom home that needs a lot of work in Santa Ana, California. While deciding how to rehab the home, they clash over style so decide to compete to see who has the better design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Two Houses for Sale
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Buena Park, CA, and calls Christina to check it out. When they arrive at the house, they find that it's dated inside and out.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and contractor Izzy Battres take on a small house in Fullerton, CA. The seemingly easy flip becomes difficult when removing a wall creates a nightmare with the city and an unpermitted laundry room must be moved.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.desc: Tarek tackles a cookie-cutter home in Newport Beach, CA, where everything looks exactly the same.

programme.title: Flipping Across America
programme.desc: It's a battle of the small house flip, as Flip or Flop's Tarek and Christina add major upgrades to virtually every inch of a 900 square foot home, while Boise Boys' Clint and Luke spend all their money on expansions.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Ranch Renovations
programme.desc: Find out which ranch renovation is best, as Flip or Flop: Nashville's Page and DeRon try to transform an old basement ranch into a modern home. Then Flip or Flop: Atlanta's Ken and Anita figure out how to make their ranch home smell better.

programme.title: House Hunters: New Digs in Nashville
programme.desc: Eric Malo's new job offer has him and his wife Alysha packing up in Chicago and heading back to Nashville where they're orginally from. The Malos want to find a house with more room than they have now

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by an out-of-state seller looking to sell an old family home. it's a large house in original condition and could be a great flip.

programme.desc: A couple that's tired of the corporate grind and Seattle weather is ready to escape to Puerto Vallarta. The corporate world has impacted their time together, so they hunt for a place where they can be with each other doing the things they love.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Looking for a Balanced Life in Mexico
programme.desc: A California couple is ready for a new adventure in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. He wants a modern home with a contemporary style, while she loves the traditional feel of exposed brick and Mexican tiles.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Doing the Research Pays Off in La Paz
programme.desc: A couple from Utah is making the move to the coastal city of La Paz. While they agree that water views are important, he really wants to find a secluded property at a low price, but she's willing to pay more if it has a big kitchen and pool.

programme.title: Mexico Life: A New Beginning in Manzanillo
programme.desc: After only experiencing Manzanillo through a television screen, this optimistic couple is excited to leave the cold winters of Canada behind and start their new life in paradise.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Trading in the Manhattan Hustle
programme.desc: A couple from New York City is looking to trade their hectic city lifestyle for the chill, relaxed vibes of Puerto Vallarta. They are looking for ocean views, near the center of restaurants and shopping, with enough room for their parents to visit.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Finding Peace in Puerto Vallarta

programme.title: Mexico Life: Heading Home to Puerto Vallarta

programme.title: My Horror Story: Run, Ghost Boy, Run
programme.desc: A college track star learns there are some things he can't run from when an evil entity attacks him in his dorm room. A security guard encounters a terrifying creature from Native American lore.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Unreal Estate

programme.title: My Horror Story: Home Sweet Hell

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Cindy Beck & Andrew Jondle
programme.desc: A farmer husband and wife are brutally murdered, setting off an investigation that exposes a startling motive fueled by lust and desperation.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patrick Frazee and Krystal Kenney
programme.desc: When Colorado mother, Kelsey Berreth, disappeared in 2018, the search for her would uncover a secret romance that burned with deadly passion. Featuring exclusive interviews with Kelsey's family friends and the investigators who broke the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Brooklyn Reynolds and Christopher Evans
programme.desc: When a loving couple is murdered in their home, the investigation uncovers a forbidden romance between two young lovers willing to do anything to get what they desire.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Tyonne Palmer and Tracy Burleson
programme.desc: When a preacher's wife is gunned down outside her Houston, Texas home, investigators uncover a sordid web of sin, sex, and a family feud with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Sonia Weidenfelder and Rick Spaulding
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a young mother in Oklahoma launches an investigation that reveals a vengeful romance and a murder conspiracy rooted in obsession and greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Down the Back Staircase
programme.desc: It all began when a bestselling author found his wife at the base of the stairs. Was this a fall or was it a crime? The story made headlines and we've been covering it for more than a decade. Here, Michael Peterson answers our questions.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on Hot Springs Drive
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion. Then, her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night. Investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: Hollywood stuntman, Garrett Warren, was shot four times but luckily survived. With many suspects in mind, see if Warren knew who was trying to kill him.

programme.title: Dateline: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning reports on a realtor from Little Rock, Arkansas who goes missing after showing a house. The search leads detectives on a gripping chase.

programme.title: Dateline: Unspeakable
programme.desc: A couple's anniversary celebration ends in murder in what appears to be a home invasion. Investigators think the suspect is much closer to the victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Ann Trexler
programme.desc: Grandma Ann Trexler moved to Florida to spend more time with her granddaughter. When the girl's father decided to move her to Montana, Ann hired a hitman to bring the relocation plan to a dead stop.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon: Who Is She
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldons' parents are desperate for answers in the 2011 disappearance of their 23-year-old daughter. Her case is turned upside down when investigators uncover evidence of a secret life that may have introduced her to danger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon: Where Is She
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of "Phoenix sightings," since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated. A surprising lead takes us to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: Up and Vanished: Tara Grinstead
programme.desc: High school teacher Tara Grinstead is missing for over a decade when podcaster Payne Lindsey begins to investigate helping lead to the arrest of two former students. When they plead not guilty, Payne's team heads back to Georgia to crack the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Baby You Can't Drive My Car

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: CIA Spy Cloud
programme.desc: A tightly formed, small cloud floats through an apartment parking lot and mysteriously disappears leaving experts to consider if this could be a new piece of clandestine technology with possible links to the CIA.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: To Be Announced

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Black Dahlia Murder
programme.desc: Christof digs into the most infamous -- and gruesome -- unsolved murder case in Los Angeles history. He uncovers an investigation derailed by corruption and finds a confession pointing him to a new suspect in the Philippines.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: Nancy and her children are found dead in an apparent murder-suicide. Fifteen years later, Donna falls to her death in the Grand Canyon. But investigators discover they're linked and are confronted by a serial killer who's been lying in wait for decades.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead while he sleeps peacefully next to his fiancée. Investigators wonder how she remained unharmed, and suspicion quickly swirls around her and two of her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: Nancy and her children are found dead in an apparent murder-suicide. Fifteen years later, Donna falls to her death in the Grand Canyon. But investigators discover they're linked and are confronted by a serial killer who's been lying in wait for decades.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead while he sleeps peacefully next to his fiancée. Investigators wonder how she remained unharmed, and suspicion quickly swirls around her and two of her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: Predator at Large: It Was A Thrill To Him
programme.desc: Women are bring murdered in Washington County, Oregon. A serial killer is one step ahead of the police. The community lives in fear. But only after more bloodshed do residents discover that the brutal killer has been living in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Some women can't admit their failings. They point the finger of blame at others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Vengeance
programme.desc: Revenge is one of the oldest motives for murder. But these cases are much more than an 'eye for an eye'. For some women, the insatiable quest for retribution grows wildly out of proportion to the point where they methodically seek Lethal Vengence.

programme.title: Deadly Women: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Beauty is only skin deep; scratch the surface and you could find an ugly soul. A gorgeous girl preys on an elderly man, a cabaret star performs a killer finale, and a farmer's wife harvests husbands.

programme.title: Deadly Women: No Good Reason
programme.desc: Hear stories of deadly women who had no real motive for killing their victims.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Sick
programme.desc: Daphne Abdela, Lisa Michelle Lambert and Sarah Kolb appear to be baby-faced schoolgirls, but don't be deceived. When they thought someone was after their boyfriends, they became cold-blooded killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loveless
programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Officer, Not a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Living in Sin
programme.desc: A Christian woman's faith is tested when she falls in love with a charming new female co-worker. As the forbidden lovers fight for their love in a community that doesn't want them, the pressure proves too much, and the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Water You Waiting For?
programme.desc: It has been a long time coming for these families to finally build their dream pools.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.desc: Eric and the crew bank on kerosene switch lamps to light up profits. If not, an antique icebox called the Vermonter might bring in some cold hard cash. It's a tough job, but Larry Bird makes an appearance and helps bail the guys out of the red.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Chesapeake Beach Build
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach retreat in Chesapeake Beach, Maryland, where they can escape the daily hustle and bustle and relax with their six-year-old son.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte

programme.desc: When Meena wants to make special ladoos for her father's homecoming party, Mira must help track down the spice merchant who has an essential ingredient. Then, while testing Neel's new vehicle in the desert, a sandstorm causes it to become lost.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Big Sleepover/ No Sweetah Cheetah
programme.desc: Doc is homesick during his first sleepover at a friend's house and later the toys mistakenly think that Donny's new cheetah action figure is sick because she is covered in spots.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Run Fozzie Run/My Brother Vinny
programme.desc: Fozzie runs away after he accidentally breaks the swing. Rizzo is feeling a little insecure when his superstar singer big brother arrives at the playroom for a visit.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Oh Brother!/ What's the Difference?
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a perfect older brother, but his brother is so perfect that he is boring Timmy to tears; Timmy wishes everything in school was mixed up like a "find it" puzzle book.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lost in Space...Camp/ Super Hot Chocolate
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: Movie: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: The Smurfs team up with human friends to save Smurfette, who has been kidnapped by Gargamel because she knows a secret spell.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy, chaotic extended family. While Bobby fits in great, Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Both are unaware their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom

programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: Movie: His Double Life
programme.desc: Five years after her husband dies, a woman is remarried to her deceased husband's business partner. Her daughter discovers that he is having an affair, and the following day, the mysterious other woman also turns up dead.

programme.title: Movie: Traffik
programme.desc: A couple heads to a secluded home in the mountains for a romantic getaway, but after a run-in with a group of bikers at a gas station the lovers find themselves under siege. Far from help and alone in the wilderness, they fight for their lives.

programme.title: Movie: Kept Woman

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Pool Rules: No Spending
programme.desc: Homemaker Jeni Cox goes to sporting goods stores, using the exercise equipment on display in lieu of a gym membership. Realtor Lisa DiMercurio spends just three dollars to stage and sell her homes.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: An insider's look at the most outrageous penny-pinching people around and their inventive ways to save money.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Entourage Sabotage
programme.desc: Sometimes, a bride's entourage is bossy instead of helpful. Tenisha wants lots of bling, but her bridesmaids insist on other styles. Elyse's mom demands she try on a pink ball gown. Adriana's family argues over the length of her hem.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval

programme.title: Weather Underground

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Run for Cover
programme.desc: As the deadliest wildfire in Californian history tears across the state, one man battles the flames single-handedly in a bid to save his home, while the US National Guard responds to the emergency.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Nature Unleashed
programme.desc: As deadly wildfires ravage southern California, the LA Fire Department battle to rescue residents trapped by the flames.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Escaping Catastrophe
programme.desc: A deadly volcano eruption in Guatemala unleashes a searing hot mass of ash, lava and toxic fumes, leaving firefighters trapped in their vehicle and fighting for survival.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Wildfires and Flash Floods
programme.desc: Blinding snow, suffocating sand and scorching flames. How to survive a raging inferno approaching and how to escape a car if caught in a flash flood and sinking fast.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Floods and Spiders
programme.desc: Test your knowledge of poisonous spiders, big wave wipeouts, icy hills and tumbleweeds on the attack! Find out if you'd know what to do if you were trapped in a flash flood or small plane crash.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Frostbite and Bears
programme.desc: Looking at how to survive pursuit by a wild bear and being trapped in a sinking car. Real-life footage tests your instincts against wildfires, frostbite, extreme fog and treacherous underwater currents.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Swamped in the Amazon
programme.desc: Yossi Ghinsberg and his friend Kevin Gale are deep in the Bolivian Amazon when they encounter extremely dangerous rapids and an unforeseen waterfall.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: A 200-Foot Plunge
programme.desc: David LaVau is driving home on a remote canyon road when he swerves to avoid a potential collision, then finds himself tumbling 200 feet down a ravine.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowbound with an Infant
programme.desc: Travelling on a small Nevada road, Jim and Jennifer Stolpa and their 5-month old-son are hit with a blizzard, and their truck gets stuck in several feet of snow.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Bear County Crash
programme.desc: Veteran pilot Dave Akers and his friend, Gary Nall, enjoy a leisurely afternoon flying over the Knik Glacier in Southern Alaska. But as they head back to the airfield, they are pulled into a downdraft and crash land in remote wilderness.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fear and Loathing in Placentia
programme.desc: The buyers head to Placentia, Calif., where Jarrod and Brandi find something that may tip the scales in their favour.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi split up, and only time will tell if it's for good. Ivy has hired a new employee to run his shop. Darrell's Montebello magic strikes again, and Rene learns the art of stripping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Man in Black is Back
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked to see Dave Hester return to the auctions with a vengeance, but even the Mogul can't stop the buyers from scoring great units in Huntington Beach. Also, Darrell tries to get Brandon in 'tip-top' shape, and Ivy must change up his game.

programme.title: Storage Wars: It's All Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Ivy has no problem spending his bucks for the right locker. Darrell and Brandon have got a hunger they need to feed.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Ghosts Don't Need Money
programme.desc: Casey tries to put a leash on Rene's spending habits, while Darrell and Brandon rely on their intuition to soar above the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Emperor of El Monte
programme.desc: The buyers head to El Monte, California, where they take the local competition head-on. Darrell and Brandon score some antique loot, while Jarrod and Brandi get a rocking good locker. Ivy hits a score that may just lead to the mother lode.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Nerds of the Round Table
programme.desc: Ivy attempts to keep his winning streak alive, while Darrell and Rene play mind games with each other. After one ends up at a crime scene and the other takes a trip back in time, things get a little foggy for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Once Upon a Locker in the West

programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.desc: North Hollywood sets the scene for another auction filled with dreams of hitting it big. Mary gets a leg up on the competition with a not so secret weapon.

programme.title: Storage Wars: North Hollywood Hustle
programme.desc: The competition becomes fierce in North Hollywood and even Dan and Laura can't escape the tension. Dave scores a locker that may be a hit and Rene fights past the local buyers to have some fun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Sweet Sniff of Success
programme.desc: The buyers head to West Covina, where everyone is vying to be top dog. Jarrod and Brandi bring an expert to sniff out the best lockers. Darrell and Brandon help everyone at the auction dress for success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Assassin's Greed
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes. Mary’s locker reveals a sticky past, while Justin shows that he can turn a small investment into a big return.
