programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A shocking courthouse escape goes horribly wrong; a woman collapses after getting convicted of conspiring to kill her husband; an out of control defendant leaves an impression on a court officer with her teeth.

programme.title: Movie: 3 Days to Kill
programme.desc: After learning that he's dying, an international spy decides to retire from his dangerous life and reconnect with his estranged family. First, however, he takes on one last mission in exchange for an experimental drug that could save his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Human Piñata

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato

programme.desc: On this show, we learn three things: don't let Mo Amer call 911, don't ask Jenny Zigrino how you look, and never let Mo Mandel speak to the audience.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Zombie Breasts
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif kicks the butt off a patient' nose, while Dr. Dubrow helps a single mother whose breast implant fell out while brushing her teeth. Meanwhile, a transgender twin needs the doctors help in completing her Bimbo Barbie transformation.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Bunny Boobs and Pooch Patrol

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Boob Greed and Bump Its

programme.title: Botched: Pinched Perfect

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Botched: Short Changed at the Nipple Bank
programme.desc: A transgender woman who got her rhinoplasty in Mexico seeks Dr. Nassif's help to fix her collapsed nose. Then, Dr. Dubrow tackles a botched double mastectomy, and a young woman travels from the UK to look faker than fake.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic
programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Passin' the Baton
programme.desc: Guy's hitting' the road and chowin' down on some long standing traditions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gettin' Fresh
programme.desc: In Boulder, Colo., a college town favourite since the 1920s is flipping grass-fed beef burgers. And, in Chicago, a family-run restaurant puts a twist on biscuits and gravy - with free-range duck.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hitting the Grill
programme.desc: Guy samples foods straight off the grill, including a burger joint in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Lunch and Brunch
programme.desc: On this road trip revisit, Guy Fieri pops by an Oklahoma City diner known for their onion burgers. Then, a Baltimore brunch spot is stepping up their grit game, and a quirky joint in Los Angeles is still putting a spin on their diner dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy is visiting places across the country and trying out their sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Eats
programme.desc: Guy's got his sights set on food with international influence. In Richardson, Texas, a Lebanese joint stacks a tall shawarma, while in Vegas, a burger spot adds an Asian twist. And in New York, a pita is done the Druze way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Latin Street Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are dancing as he digs into all kinds of Latin favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Lunch and Brunch
programme.desc: On this road trip revisit, Guy Fieri pops by an Oklahoma City diner known for their onion burgers. Then, a Baltimore brunch spot is stepping up their grit game, and a quirky joint in Los Angeles is still putting a spin on their diner dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old to New
programme.desc: Guy's in for some old school favourites and new school stunners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Guy explores restaurants that serve literally from the farm and the ocean to the table.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D All Stars
programme.desc: In Georgetown, Texas, Guy hooks up with Matthew McConaughey at a massive diner serving up righteous ham and waffles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoke And Seafood
programme.desc: Guys visits a Baltimore barbecue food truck for pulled pork and ribs, and a shrimp shack in Islamorada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crankin' Up the Classics
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, an Italian deli serves pizza and pasta. In Dallas, the menu includes gumbo and burgers with brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tasting all kinds of international comfort classics such as the authentic British fish 'n chips joint known for keeping it real.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Takeout at Home
programme.desc: The divine combination of flavours in Rachael Ray's crazy Szechuan beef and messy corn with Shishido packs a punch with every bite. The secret to this takeout favorite is the ground Szechuan peppercorns blended with turmeric and sweet rice wine vinegar.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Sicilian Splash Party
programme.desc: Valerie went on the trip of a lifetime to Italy last summer, but this year, she's bringing Italy to her own backyard! She's hosting an elegant poolside party inspired by her adventures in Sicily to kick off the summer.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sizzling Summer
programme.desc: The Kitchen is kicking off summer with a hot menu, starting with Sunny Anderson's sizzling summer burger and Jeff Mauro's side dish, double potato salad with pesto.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Impromptu Get-Together
programme.desc: Trisha's friend, Sunny Sweeney, is in town so she throws an impromptu get-together. Trisha whips up a quick and easy summer menu of roasted red pepper hummus, cucumber bites and pulled chicken sandwiches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Summer Mega Salads
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is singing the praises of amazing main course summer salads that she has made over the years.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-A
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's sharing recipes from her pizza place in town. For takeout with a difference, she makes foolproof pizza dough, garlic butter and a no-cook pizza sauce and uses them for her triple pepperoni pizza and her signature pie, pizza Ree-a.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Al Fresco Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares delicious meals to enjoy outside, including honey bourbon chicken pops and summer orzo salad. Plus, Alex Guarnaschelli makes the perfect light bite, summer berry Carpaccio, and Katie Lee prepares fresh and vibrant arugula lemonade.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Family Comfort
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is making some of her favorite family recipes, including Gnocchi with Butter Thyme Sauce, which her Aunt Raffy is also making at her home. Giada checks in with her mom in Rome while making Veronica's Stuffed Tomatoes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Liquor Store Secrets
programme.desc: Ina's unlocking her liquor store secrets and easy techniques that take red wine-braised short ribs, fennel soup gratin and an awesome fresh apple spice cake to the next level.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Budget Wheel Games
programme.desc: Before each game, Guy Fieri spins a budget wheel that determines how much the chefs get when purchasing groceries for a specific dish. Then he spins a second wheel that further restricts their options.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: It's Egg-Cellent
programme.desc: Guy starts off the games by handing the chefs his unusual Grocery List and they scramble to make their best egg dish. In the second game, the chefs struggle to figure out how to make a dinner party for four with less than $8.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG vs. DDD
programme.desc: Two of Guy Fieri's worlds collide as chefs from his shows are pitted against each other in some serious culinary combat. Guy gives them personalized shopping lists and has them play a game of bowling to determine which aisles they can shop in.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Superfans
programme.desc: They've seen every episode and know every twist, and now three of GGG's biggest superfans get to play their favourite Flavortown games. Luckily, their favourite GGG judges, Beau MacMillan, Damaris Phillips and Aarti Sequeira, are on hand to mentor them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror

programme.title: 48 Hours: Red Notice for Murder
programme.desc: A Brooklyn woman turns to a New York private eye for help tracking down a beautiful Russian she believes robbed and killed her mother.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Clown Did It
programme.desc: Nearly three decades after a woman was shot in her Palm Beach County, Fla., home by someone wearing a clown costume, two people who were there describe what they saw in this interview.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Shattered Glass
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer James 'Houston' Glass was nearly killed by a grenade in Kuwait. What was thought to be a terror attack would turn out to be attempted murder. He is shocked as he has no idea who would want him dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Death in Payson Canyon

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fatal Crossing
programme.desc: A beautiful mom and her young daughter are found dead near train tracks under mysterious circumstances. Questions from '48 Hours' help get police to reopen the case.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Ruthless
programme.desc: NCIS agents detail the hunt for a serial rapist in Jacksonville, N.C., who appeared to be targeting women with military connections. With the help of two victims attacked in the same night, agents were able to apprehend the criminal.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Vicious Vices
programme.desc: An egomaniac spins his secrets and lies into a deadly web and pride turns a heart to darkness. Then, it's a love triangle with razor sharp edges; with lust and greed feeding the flame, someone will end up in ashes.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Rocky Mountain Murder
programme.desc: A red hot affair leads to a dangerous combination of lust, greed, and pride, but a loving family does nothing to quell a man's illicit desires. And later, when two lost souls try to start over in the wilds of Idaho, it leads to a deadly twist of betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: A mother finds her teenage daughter savagely murdered inside their own home. A few drops of blood discovered decades later may be the key to solving the tragic mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: A father of four is gunned down during a vicious attack, but as police investigate the murder, they discover that nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: Two girls take a trip to the mall and never come home. Less than 24 hours later they are found shot to death in a desolate field. An investigation aims to resolve if they were killed by someone they knew or had been victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Brawl
programme.desc: A handsome marine lands the girl of his dreams. But the perils of their long distance love push these newlyweds to the edge. When Shari and Deon's romance misfires in a tragic accident - the collateral damage is deadly.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.desc: Posing as a firefighter, a writer kidnaps a co-worker and terrorizes her for 16 hours before leading detectives on a chase.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints

programme.desc: Tiger Claw returns and sets out to destroy the Ninja Turtles at any cost.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Pretty Little Choirs

programme.title: The Thundermans: Paging Dr. Thunderman

programme.title: The Thundermans: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Hank becomes Max and Phoebe's new science teacher. When he accidentally eats special turkey sandwiches that make him fall asleep at school, the twins must use their powers to help him get through his lesson plan.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones
programme.desc: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn, Ray and Henry accidentally bring to life the Popcorn Monster. To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger and have him pilot his own drone.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders

programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flying High! Harmony Pegasus!
programme.desc: Tango decides to take the Victories on a training journey to battle more powerful Bladers. While Dante meets with the mysterious Pheng Hope, Delta challenges the artistic Blindt DeVoy.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flash of Light! Shining Crux!
programme.desc: Delta and Blindt decide who'll walk away the victor, while Pheng takes the Victories back to his temple so that Arman can make good on his promise.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Battle in the Skies!
programme.desc: Dante challenges Pheng to a rematch. After the battle, the gang heads to Battle Island to compete in a Blading circuit.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Spin! Advance! Survive!
programme.desc: Dante takes on a member of the Risen 3 on his first roll in the Blading circuit. Meanwhile, Arman is already ahead of the pack.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Stage! Facing Aiger!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Shining Bright! Hyper-Flux!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Invasion! The New King!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Command Dragon!
Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: WWE Edition
programme.desc: WWE superstars join the cast of professional pranksters to pull off some of the most outrageous pranks yet including staging a fake infomercial fiasco, making an arm wrestling video game come to life, and turning a house upside down.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: There's a New Kid in Town
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Slumber Party
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Wedding
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: LOL the Vote
programme.desc: Chance is hoping to be voted 'class clown' for a record breaking fourth year in a row, but finds out Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is vying for 'most academic.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Wigging Out
programme.desc: When Bailey's hairstylist is sick, a new stylist has to cut her hair. Meanwhile, Chance is trying to find a way to make Herman fly.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone
programme.desc: Brad decides to tag along when Kick vows to spend a night in the untamed wilderness and make it out alive. Later, Kick must track down a ferocious devil dog before Mrs. Chicarelly gets home and gets him grounded for life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Clean... to the Extreme/ Stand and Delivery
programme.desc: Kick accidentally breaks Gunther's dad's foosball table and must complete a series of favours to replace it before Gunther's dad gets home. Kick takes over the delivery services at Battlesnax and must defend delivery guarantee.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Genesis in Motion!
Yo-Kai Watch: Komasan: Movin' on Up/ Yo-kai Cynake / Yo-kai Rockabelly/ Manjimutt: The Great Dog Escape Episode 6
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Dreaming of the Sun and Moon!
DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Rats on a Train
programme.desc: The Lab Rats get their first mission to stop Davenport's hi-tech super fast train from speeding out of control. When they discover that Leo accidentally discarded the braking system they were supposed to install, they are forced to improvise.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chip Switch
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase defy warnings from Davenport and swap bionic chips with bad results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Smart and Smarter
programme.desc: When Chase refuses to admit that Adam has good ideas, Adam decides to run against him for 'Student of the Semester.' Meanwhile, Leo takes advantage of Bree's bionic super speed by making her his personal taxi.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Commando APP
programme.desc: On the Lab Rats' first day of school, all goes awry when Chase is confronted by a football player and his 'Commando App' is triggered, transforming him into an unruly drill sergeant.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Concert in a Can
programme.desc: The Lab Rats befriend a new kid in school named Marcus, who takes to the whole gang very quickly, except for Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Mission: Space
programme.desc: While Adam, Bree and Chase head off for their latest mission, Leo is tasked with distracting his nemesis Marcus. When Marcus wanders into the lab, Davenport is forced to cover and answer his prying question.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Missin' the Mission
programme.desc: Leo finally goes a mission with Davenport and Eddy in an attempt to stop an underground gas leak. Adam, Bree and Chase struggle to escape from Principal Perry's detention lockdown.

programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Dirty Infrastructure

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Tight Spaces
programme.desc: En route to explore a cave, Mike Rowe and his dirty crew reminisce about classic jobs from the show's history that had them squirming into tight spaces. They also check in with some of the hard-working people that have been featured on the program.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Filthy Animals
programme.desc: Driving out to an ostrich farm in search of eggs, Mike Rowe and his dirty crew reminisce about classic animal-related jobs from the show's history. They also check in with some of the hard-working people that have been featured on the program.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Problem Solvers
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and his dirty crew take a drive in search of a cold beer, reminiscing about classic jobs from the show's history featuring innovators and problem solvers. They check in with some of the hard-working people that have appeared on the program.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Peacock Bass on the Amazon
programme.desc: We fish for peacock bass on the Amazon River.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A powerboat breaks up during a race; a train plows through a pick up truck; a plane crashes during a test flight.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Eyes Down Deep
programme.desc: Ali and Rush use technology to see what's lurking below.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Pi-Rat Paradise
programme.desc: Josh explores places where unusual heroes rule the day, from a legendary pirate paradise near Madagascar to a small Mexican town that celebrates a wealthy rancher's generosity with the most explosive festival on Earth.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group, and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Makani desperately pushes through the broiling valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. Suzanne plots her exit from Seth, but Africa's heat thwarts her plan and forces a survivalist to leave the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 1
programme.desc: Elon Musk and the greatest minds from SpaceX and NASA are on the verge of making space history. Behind-the-scenes access reveals how these pioneers dream up and test new technology that will make trips to the moon, Mars and beyond commonplace.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 2
programme.desc: Elon Musk joins great minds from SpaceX and NASA to make space history. Together, the visionary pioneers dream up and test new, cutting-edge tech that will make space travel commonplace.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Matter of Life or Seth
programme.desc: Brutal heat punishes Suzanne as she makes a new start after leaving Seth. Barehanded Killer Bulent takes on a monitor lizard. A potential snake attack could be Seth's first African food win. A tribe plans a move that could upend the challenge.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dueling Visions
programme.desc: Kristin is torn between looking sexy or traditional. Alexa also wants a dress with sex appeal, but she needs to please her conservative dad. Diana can't decide between a flowy or structured gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Style Therapy
programme.desc: Edgy bride Callie is more concerned with pleasing her mom than sticking to her own style.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Brother Hits Kleinfeld
programme.desc: A bride and groom from 'Big Brother' shop together, social media pro Kristin must look perfect, and Chef Cat Cora gets married.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You Look Like a Chicken!
programme.desc: Small-town girl Angelica is looking for bling in the big city, but her entourage is skeptical. Socialite Tracy needs an over-the-top dress for her royal Kentucky wedding, and Lonaa unearths a Randy dress from over 20 years ago for her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Rockin' Harmonica
programme.desc: Kathryn's wedding is at an art house movie theatre and Heidi's guests celebrate her day at a glass-covered garden.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Freak Weather

programme.desc: A shocking courthouse escape goes horribly wrong; a woman collapses after getting convicted of conspiring to kill her husband; an out of control defendant leaves an impression on a court officer with her teeth.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Eddie heads a peer counseling session that leads the crew to learn more about themselves.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Fire Choir
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme put the Q&A in quarantine with digital visits from Paul Soter and John Popper of Blues Traveler.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker doesn't like camping and what the guys say when they're asked for directions. Plus, learn which Joker has a thing for segways.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Eddie heads a peer counseling session that leads the crew to learn more about themselves.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker doesn't like camping and what the guys say when they're asked for directions. Plus, learn which Joker has a thing for segways.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Eddie heads a peer counseling session that leads the crew to learn more about themselves.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: British Invasion
programme.desc: The guys cross the pond for the first-ever international episode of Impractical Jokers. Joe, Murr, Q and Sal may be up to their old tricks, but the clueless people on the receiving end of the those tricks won't be the typical 'marks' they're used to.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No. Holds. Barred
programme.desc: It's getting hot and heavy as powerlifting besties battle a couple whose on and off status is ever evolving.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Half Baked

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Feisty Fiesta
programme.desc: It's a Frozen Food Feud for the first game as the chefs race to gather ingredients for a seafood dish. In the second game, the chefs get Guy's Grocery List and must incorporate all the ingredients, including soy sauce, into their Mexican dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Lunch and Brunch
programme.desc: On this road trip revisit, Guy Fieri pops by an Oklahoma City diner known for their onion burgers. Then, a Baltimore brunch spot is stepping up their grit game, and a quirky joint in Los Angeles is still putting a spin on their diner dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown Medley
programme.desc: A Memphis bar-turned-bistro offers low brow favourites; a food truck in Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homemade and Homebrewed
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's mixing' his love of home cooking with his appreciation of homebrew. In Chicago, Ill., a dive refines small plate Mexican with dishes like shiitake mushroom empanadas and flautas with homemade queso fresco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Vegas, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads off the Vegas strip, checks out a dive in Buffalo and a Bulgarian tapas joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos and Tots
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. In Denver, an old-time bar is going all-out homemade on tater tots, pork rinds and a monster pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Long Standing Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy finds a slice of history all over the country starting at Santa Barbara to Dallas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Joints
programme.desc: Guy visits a St. Louis tavern for German spaetzle, and Virginia for calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Al Fresco
programme.desc: Giada heads to Palm Springs with her daughter and her boyfriend for a weekend of fun in the sun. Giada makes them a poolside, al fresco feast with picnic pasta, make-your-own flank steak hoagies and almond butter brownies.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Guilt-Free Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay's brunch menu is so satisfying and delicious, you'd never know it's good for you too! His healthy menu includes a Blueberry-Pomegranate Power Bowl with Crispy Quinoa Crumbles, creamy and flavorful Avocado Toast.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: French to Make at Home
programme.desc: Ina has all the tricks for cooking French at home with secrets to a show.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Backyard Beach Party
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has enjoyed many wonderful summer meals on the shores of the Pacific, and she's welcoming the warm weather with an Italian-style backyard beach party with her family.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All in One
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making non-stop all-in-one wonders! There's a simple chicken and dressing sheet pan supper, lemon, basil and shrimp risotto in a skillet, the easiest ramen pho and a layered portable Greek salad in a jar.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes comfort food the easy way starting with carrot cake French toast, a tasty combo of two comforting classics in one make-ahead breakfast. There's also corn and green chili chowder made fast in a multi pot, a butterscotch lava cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Stanton and Paige
programme.desc: Ree's daughter and her friend request Chinese food for their sleepover dinner. Ree whips up cashew chicken, edamame fried rice and quick pan-fried kale. The next morning for breakfast its homemade granola for strawberry granola.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl's Brunch
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to her favourite brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. There's mini quiches with peas and bacon, garlicky lemony kale and a dark chocolate scone loaf with marzipan for a sweet treat.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Gives Back
programme.desc: After a morning spent at an adoption event for homeless animals, Valerie uses new and old family recipes to throw a sparkling cocktail party for her fellow volunteers.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Cali Brunch
programme.desc: Guy and his chef friends celebrate the Golden State with a Cali-inspired brunch spread. Eric Greenspan makes lemon ricotta pancakes, Aaron May prepares crab benedict and avocado salad and Carl Ruiz makes tallegio and asparagus paninis.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Meats and Sweets Feel the Heat
programme.desc: Only Michael Symon would think to make Moussaka on the grill, taking the Mediterranean casserole layered with meat, veggies and cheese sauce outside. His wife, Liz, joins him to create a light, complimentary side dish of grilled and steamed artichokes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: BBQ and A
programme.desc: The Kitchen answers all of your burning BBQ questions. Geoffrey Zakarian starts by sharing the best cut of steak for the grill with his Grilled Hanger Steaks with Roasted Garlic Romesco Sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple G Redemption
programme.desc: Four chefs return to Flavortown for a second chance at the $20,000 Shopping Spree. But Guy Fieri doesn't make this trip any easier, as the four chefs make a redemption dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Whiz Kids
programme.desc: Four culinary whiz kids compete in this special kids edition of Guy's Grocery Games. First, the young chefs win a mandatory ingredient for an Italian dish using the first ever 'Groceryland' board game.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Kids
programme.desc: Kids take on Flavortown after Guy Fieri invites four bite-sized chefs to play two huge games.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Too Many Treasures

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Compilation

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Emergency
programme.desc: When Grizz comes home with a live crab, he thinks it can become a pet for the brothers to share. However, after the crab pinches Ice Bear's ear and won't let go, Panda and Grizz have to get their injured brother to the hospital, and fast.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Tote Life
programme.desc: When a hipster grocery store clerk shames the Bears for asking for plastic grocery bags, the Bears realize that eco-friendly tote bags are their way of gaining acceptance amongst the progressive people of the Bay Area.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Perfect Tree
programme.desc: Chloe and Ice Bear drive up north to find the perfect Christmas tree. Meanwhile, Grizz and Panda are in charge of decorating Chloe’s house.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Paperboyz
programme.desc: The Baby Bears get jobs as paper boys.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: A Hero's Sacrifice! Last Chance to Save the World!
programme.desc: Just when Gohan thinks he has finally succeeded in defeating Cell, the monster has one last devastating development that could destroy the world.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Combine Your Strength! The Final Kamehame-Ha!
programme.desc: Cell returns with the intentions to wipe out Earth once and for all.

programme.title: American Dad!: Live and Let Fry
programme.desc: When Langley Falls implements a ban on trans fats, Stan finds himself legally separated from his favourite foods. He sets a poor example for the rest of the family when he blatantly disregards the law and uses Steve to smuggle in some trans-fatty food.

programme.title: American Dad!: Roy Rogers McFreely
programme.desc: When Stan forgets to pick up grenadine at the grocery store, Roger goes ballistic and vows to get him back by taking over a project close to his heart: the Homeowner's Association.

programme.title: American Dad!: Jack's Back
programme.desc: Steve signs Stan up for a father-son bike tournament, but the plan veers off-track when Stan admits that his father never taught him how to ride a bike. Meanwhile, Rogers hires Hayley to bartend at his makeshift bar in the attic.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Lawnmower Dog
programme.desc: Rick helps Jerry out with the dog, broh. Don’t even trip about this episode because they also incept Goldenfold.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Thin White Line
programme.desc: Using his keen sense of smell, Brian gets a job with the local police department.

programme.title: Family Guy: Brian Does Hollywood
programme.desc: Brian leaves Quahog for Hollywood in order to write films and takes the first job offer.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Awaken Your Dormant Fighting Spirit: Gohan’s Fight
programme.desc: Out of practice and lacking knowledge of his opponent’s tactics, Gohan will have to learn as he goes. But soon after the round begins, Gohan is forced to fight blind in more ways than one.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind: Verso il Colosseo di Roma
programme.desc: While Bruno and the team analyze face and fingerprints left behind they receive a mysterious call. The team must race to the Colosseum if they ever want to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: Mob Psycho 100: Mob and Reigen: A Giant Tsuchinoko Appears
programme.desc: A high school student tries to suppress his extremely powerful psychic powers.

programme.title: Black Clover: Clues
programme.desc: A contingent of Black Bulls seeks info from Gordon's family of Curse Magic experts, while Noelle digs deeper into what really killed her mother Acier.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: When You Wish Upon a Spore
programme.desc: After insulting a superfan, Flypp is ordered to complete Crayzar's new sensitivity training program.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Can't Stand the Heat? Ultimate Kitchen Technique! Finish Them, Warrior Bard!!
programme.desc: The Leptons discover Leto has a flair for the culinary arts and pressure him into becoming a contestant in Crayzar's cooking competition.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: The Heart's Eye
programme.desc: Hinata defends Neji from a White Zetsu clone while he’s recovering from an earlier fight. She then remembers the time Neji protected her the same way after she temporarily lost her sight from overtraining.

programme.title: Samurai Jack: XCIV
programme.desc: A gravely injured Samurai Jack chooses to create his own fate by going up against the deadliest foes he’s ever faced, Assassins from the Cult of Aku.

programme.title: The Shivering Truth: Holeways
programme.desc: Every father is mother to a tunnel inside us, leading them away.

programme.title: The Shivering Truth: Tow a Shell
programme.desc: If you hold your mother against your ear and listen closely, you can hear your dead father softly crying 'my child has gone bananas'.

programme.title: The Boondocks: The Real
programme.desc: In order to get on a reality show, Riley convinced Granddad to pretend to be blind. Huey is convinced he is being stalked by a government agent.

programme.title: The Venture Brothers: The Saphrax Protocol
programme.desc: Deep inside Guild Headquarters, The Monarch and 21 face their ultimate ordeal. Meanwhile the Venture Brothers face one of their own.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Waits With You
programme.desc: Waiting is the hard part, says that popular song. In this episode, Joe Pera and you wait for his Nana to finish her appointment, so they can go to Friday night fish fry.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Guides You Through the Dark
programme.desc: When the power goes out on a Summer evening, Joe Pera takes you outside to wander around the neighborhood and see what his neighbors are up to. Featuring some of Michigan’s best lighthouses.

programme.desc: Tia and Earl face a decision about an elderly hound needing medical attention at an Alabama shelter. An abandoned, aggressive dog is found roaming a trash-filled backyard, while Lizzy and Moe help a pair of potential adopters find their fur-ever friend.

programme.desc: Matriarch giraffe Dagmar is ready to give birth after a 15-month pregnancy. An orangutan family who was spared when fire ripped through their habitat attempts to resume normal life, while zookeepers try to wrangle a rogue macaw who flew the coop.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Dogs in Prison
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania prison offers to take twenty dogs from Villalobos. An emaciated pit bull fights for its life. A potential adopter travels from Michigan to meet a dog that stole her heart, but then is shocked when she comes face to face.

programme.desc: Tia and Earl face a decision about an elderly hound needing medical attention at an Alabama shelter. An abandoned, aggressive dog is found roaming a trash-filled backyard, while Lizzy and Moe help a pair of potential adopters find their fur-ever friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Face Off
programme.desc: Tia meets a family of eight looking to adopt a new dog after losing theirs to cancer. Then, a rescue-call takes Tia and her daughter Tania into New Orleans’s infamous ninth war to face off with a snarling, sick dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Ghost Dog

programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas intervenes when a black bear cub gets separated from its mother and wreaks havoc on a small community. As heavy rains cause rivers to flood, Officer Eric Fluette races to rescue a man whose canoe has flipped in the rapids.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Big Bad Woods
programme.desc: Anything can happen in Maine's 17 million acres of rugged wilderness. Angry hunters get loud with Warden Lounder over an illegal deer. Warden MacCabe enlists a 90-year-old local to help catch a deer baiter. A missing hunter sets off a full-scale search.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Long Shot
programme.desc: Simmons, Parker and Robertson catch sportsmen who fired from inside their truck. Spahr leads the search for a missing elderly woman in York County. The dive team is mustered to search for two duck hunters presumed drowned in the Sebasticook River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future
programme.desc: Elon Musk and experts from SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize space exploration. Special inside access reveals how their cutting-edge spacecraft technology will carry humans to the moon, Mars and beyond.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fire for Freedom
programme.desc: Identical twins Caleb and Joshua are the apples of their father's eye, but the pressure to be exceptional manifests into dangerous hatred. Isolated from the world, their seclusion fuels a need to break free at any cost.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: From the womb, the Cormier twins are partners in mischief. But as they get older, their innocent antics devolve into a much darker game. Soon, the battle for reality and fantasy bleeds into real life threatening to tear the twins apart.

programme.title: Evil Twins: All-American Killers
programme.desc: Identical twins Roman and Ruslan Glukhoy are high school wrestling champions with a bright future in professional sports. But when a freak accident shatters their dreams, they follow a path to death and destruction with blood on their hands.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Lies or Alibis
programme.desc: Scott Davis' past caught up to him when he found himself on trial for murdering his estranged wife's new boyfriend 10 years earlier. Now his family has called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to investigate what they believe is a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Who Killed the Doctor?
programme.desc: A prominent Utica, New York doctor is struck by a mysterious illness and eventually dies from it. Detectives are able to prove her death is no accident, and the answer to who killed her lies in a milkshake.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: Who Killed Angie Dodge?
programme.desc: CeCe Moore investigates a 1996 murder case with the most degraded DNA sample ever used to identify a killer through genetic genealogy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Affair
programme.desc: After one partner in a marriage has an affair, the wife says she's moving forward. But with hidden back accounts, DNA testing kits and a gun, the woman is becoming unhinged. A deadly act of revenge leaves just one person to tell the tale.

programme.title: Who Killed the Doctor?
programme.desc: A prominent Utica, New York doctor is struck by a mysterious illness and eventually dies from it. Detectives are able to prove her death is no accident, and the answer to who killed her lies in a milkshake.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: Who Killed Angie Dodge?
programme.desc: CeCe Moore investigates a 1996 murder case with the most degraded DNA sample ever used to identify a killer through genetic genealogy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri
programme.desc: A young mother vanishes while out jogging. A frantic search is mounted. Then, just as suddenly, three weeks later she reappears, battered and bruised and her long blond hair chopped off.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Hero or Killer?
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio in 1991, 15-year-old David Clark was convicted of setting a house on fire that killed a 12-year-old girl. Now, two of his sisters have called Chris and Fatima in to investigate and help them prove this was a wrongful conviction.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: A night of partying by fraternity brothers ends with a knock on the door and gunfire. One student is dead, three are wounded, and a freshman freely admits he was the shooter. He claims it was self-defence. But others say he was looking for revenge.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Family Plot
programme.desc: Members of a Midwestern suburban family begin mysteriously dying off after weeks of flu-like symptoms. But after a third family member is hospitalized, authorities begin to believe something far more sinister is at work.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part One
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part Two
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Strange Passenger
programme.desc: In May 2000, friends Liz Reiser and Brandi Hicks go to a video store in the quaint Ohio town of New Philadelphia. Their plans for an innocent movie night morph into a true-life horror film when they give a ride to a stranger in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.
